source.name: Rocky Mount buyer-builder sprint
source.method: Current new-home community listings plus official builder/community pages where reachable. City CSS permit search requires login, so rows are active-community buyer-validation candidates, not permit-verified buyers.

summary.target: NC SF Development Site Rocky Mount 27803
summary.minimumUniqueBuildersNote: Project-specific buyer-builder call sheet for NC SF Development Site Rocky Mount 27803; 10 curated active/recently-active builder candidates is sufficient for this lane.

operatingRules: Rows are buyer-validation candidates until a direct call/email captures buy box and acquisition path.
NewHomeSource/Zillow-style listings are discovery/context, not permit validation.
City Rocky Mount confirms building/trades permits and CSS portal, but public permit search requires sign-in in this environment.
No seller sourcing/contact promotion from this packet until buyer geography, max price, product, close speed, package recipient, and deal killers are captured.
